Business: Landsmill Green Limited engages in the IT-enabled BPO, infrastructure, and general trading businesses in India. The company provides customer care services, including in bound and out bound services, as well as handles the business relations of clients on their behalf. It also develops infrastructure facilities. The company was formerly known as Ex…
